allow: Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('sportsedge.db'\); const count = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) as n FROM tips WHERE confidence = 'BAIXA'\\"\).get\(\); console.log\('Tips BAIXA:', count.n\);")

Bash(node -e " const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const tennis=j.filter\(s=>s.key&&s.key.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('tennis'\)\); console.log\('Tennis sports:', JSON.stringify\(tennis.map\(s=>\({key:s.key,title:s.title,active:s.active}\)\),null,2\)\); ")

Bash(node -e " const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); try { const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const tennis=j.filter\(s=>s.key&&s.key.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('tennis'\)\); console.log\('TENNIS:', JSON.stringify\(tennis.map\(s=>\({key:s.key,title:s.title,active:s.active}\)\),null,2\)\); console.log\('Total sports:', j.length\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('RAW:', d.slice\(0,300\)\); } ")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('IDs:', [e['id'] for e in d.get\('events',[]\)[:5]]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('events:', len\(d.get\('events',[]\)\)\); [print\(e['id'], e['tournament']['name'], '|', e['homeTeam']['name'], 'vs', e['awayTeam']['name']\) for e in d.get\('events',[]\)[:10]]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); evts=d.get\('events',[]\)[:5]; [print\(e['id'], e['tournament']['name'], '|', e['homeTeam']['name'], 'vs', e['awayTeam']['name'], '|', e['status']['type']\) for e in evts]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['id'], s.get\('name'\)\) for s in d[:40]]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); evs=d.get\('events',[]\); print\(f'total={len\(evs\)}'\); [print\(e['id'], '|', e.get\('tournament',{}\).get\('uniqueTournament',{}\).get\('slug','NO_SLUG'\), '|', e.get\('tournament',{}\).get\('uniqueTournament',{}\).get\('name','NO_NAME'\), '|', e['homeTeam']['name'], 'vs', e['awayTeam']['name'], '|', e.get\('status',{}\).get\('type','?'\)\) for e in evs[:15]]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['id'], s.get\('name', '?'\), '| hasOfferings=', s.get\('hasOfferings', '?'\), '| matchupCount=', s.get\('matchupCount', 0\)\) for s in d]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); dota=[l for l in d if 'dota' in l.get\('name',''\).lower\(\)]; print\('Dota leagues hoje:', len\(dota\)\); [print\(f\\"  {l.get\('matchupCount','?'\):>3} | {l.get\('name','?'\)} [{l.get\('group','?'\)}]\\"\) for l in sorted\(dota, key=lambda x: -x.get\('matchupCount',0\)\)]")
